pr.title: Record: 0.4374 BPB — Distributed Prefill + Order-Adaptive 15-Gram + EBLS

output.summary: Distributed prefill of 15-gram caches plus order-adaptive entropy gating on EBLS/LoRA keeps multi-GPU sliding eval aligned with sequential scoring.
techniques: Distributed cache pre-fill before scoring to mirror single-GPU context history
Order-adaptive entropy gating with sigmoid interpolation across 2–15 gram orders
EBLS shared-block + LoRA deviations to fit transformer in 16MB
